title: Geometric Font Edge
description: An even sharper variant of GeoFont with a hint of sci-fi. Also supports Caxton!
body:
![Edge Preview](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/raw/edge/images/geofont_edge_preview.gif)
 [![Original Badge](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/raw/edge/images/2_badge.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/geometric-font-2) [![Legacy Badge](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/raw/edge/images/legacy_badge.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/geometric-font) [![Caxton Badge](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/raw/edge/images/caxton_badge.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton)


## About
There are a lot of HD font remakes out there, but none that go for a sharper style that (in my opinion) suits vanilla better. Another issue with most other HD fonts is that they use bitmap images, which will look jagged and distorted unless set to a specific GUI scale. That's why this font exists!

**Geometric Font** started out as a custom font dedicated to another resourcepack project -[Dracula Theme](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dracula-theme)- but ended up becoming [its own pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/geometric-font), which is now named GeoFont Legacy.

GeoFont Edge is a completely rebuilt version of the original font with full OpenType support and heavily stylized to be even sharper then the original. The sci-fi vibe still looks great in vanilla Minecraft, or right alongside any sleek or futuristic GUI pack! Check the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/geometric-font-edge/gallery) for more examples!

#### [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) is highly recommended for crisper font rendering and full italic+bold support! (automatically enabled if installed)

## Resources

- Want to use this font in your own works? See the [license](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/blob/edge/LICENSE.md) and dedicated repo for [GeoFont (Typeface)](https://github.com/Xetheon/GeoFont)
- Curious about updates on things I work on or just want to hang out? Join my [Discord!](https://discord.gg/3gtNAQgv2G)
